h=[==[1H`[n2D--⁠[j6-U"ZmN:Y]==]local function i(j) local k={} j=f(j,"\026","") j=f(j,c(0XE2,128,0x8b),"") j=f(j,c(0Xe2,0X80,140),"") j=f(j,c(0xE2,0x81,160),"") j=f(j,c(239,0XBB,0Xbf),"") local l={} local m=0x1 for n=1,#j do local o=d(j,n) if o>=33 and o<=0x75 then l[m]=c(o) m+=0X1 end end j=a(l) local p=#j local q=0X1 local r=0X1 while q<=p do local s=q+0x4 local t=(s<=p) and 0X5 or(p-q+1) if t==0X0 then break end local u,v,w,x,y=d(j,q,s) v=if not(not v) then v else 0X75;w=if w then w else 0X75;x=x or 0x75;y=if y then y else 0x75 local z=((((u-0X21)*0x55+(v-0X21))*0X55+(w-0x21))*0X55+(x-0X21))*0x55+(y-33) local ba=z//0X1000000%0X100 local bb=z//0X10000%0X100 local bc=z//0X100%256 local bd=z%0x100 local be=c(ba,bb,bc,bd) if t<0x5 then be=e(be,0X1,t-1) end k[r]=be r+=1 q+=0x5 end return a(k) end local function bf(bg,bh) local bi={} local bj=#bh for bk=0X1,#bg do local bl=((bk-1)%bj)+1 bi[bk]=c((d(bg,bk)-d(bh,bl))%0X100) end return a(bi) end local function bm(bn) local bo=d(bn,0X1) if bo==0x0 then return e(bn,0X2) end local bp={} local bq=0X1 local br=0X2 local bs=#bn while br<=bs do local bt=d(bn,br) br+=0x1 if bt<0X80 then local bu=bt+0x1 for bv=0x0,bu-0X1 do bp[bq]=e(bn,br+bv,br+bv) bq+=0X1 end br+=bu elseif bt<0Xc0 then local bw=bt-0x7D local bx=d(bn,br) br+=0x1 local by=bq-bx for bz=0X0,bw-0x1 do bp[bq]=bp[by+bz] bq+=0X1 end elseif bt<224 then local ca=bt-0xbc local cb=d(bn,br)*0X100+d(bn,br+0x1) br+=0X2 local cc=bq-cb for cd=0X0,ca-0x1 do bp[bq]=bp[cc+cd] bq+=0X1 end elseif bt==224 then local ce=d(bn,br)+0x24 local cf=d(bn,br+0X1)*0x100+d(bn,br+0X2) br+=0X3 local cg=bq-cf for ch=0x0,ce-0X1 do bp[bq]=bp[cg+ch] bq+=0x1 end else local ci=d(bn,br)+0X4 local cj=e(bn,br+0X1,br+0x1) br+=0X2 for ck=0X0,ci-0X1 do bp[bq]=cj bq+=0X1 end end end return a(bp) end local cl=bm(bf(i(g),i(h))) if d(cl,0X1)~=0Xcf or d(cl,0x2)~=0x51 or d(cl,0x3)~=0xfe or d(cl,0X4)~=0xce then while true do end end local cm=b(e(cl,0x5))() return cm(...) end)(table.concat,loadstring,string.char,string.byte,string.sub,string.gsub,...)
